name: Correspondence Only
description: Paper-based correspondence courses with no technology component. Graduates lack 21st-century digital skills. Poor educational quality and limited human interaction.

name: Face-to-Face at Facility
description: In-person instruction at the facility with basic computer labs. Staff must digitize papers and track achievement manually. Space constraints limit course selection. Subject to quarantine disruptions.
it_requirements: Basic computer lab, projector, printer, classroom AV

name: Offline Student Network
description: Dedicated offline student-only network with managed laptops and face-to-face teaching. Options for offline LMS, digital journal databases, or secure USB storage. Colleges must manage two versions of courses and databases.
it_requirements: LAN infrastructure, managed student laptops, offline LMS server, content server, endpoint management

name: Remote Educator Access
description: VPN access for college staff to remotely grade papers, load courses, and answer questions on the offline LMS. Dedicated video conferencing for remote teaching via Zoom/WebEx/Teams.
it_requirements: VPN gateway, firewall with VPN termination, video conferencing endpoints, enhanced network segmentation, bandwidth management

name: Online LMS Access
description: Students access college partner's online LMS via allow-listed internet connection. Courses must not reference external sites. Risk of unsanctioned outside communications. Ongoing monitoring of allow-list functionality is often unrealistic.
it_requirements: Internet connectivity, next-gen content filtering, allow-list management platform, monitoring and alerting tools, endpoint security, DLP

name: Full Digital Integration
description: Comprehensive managed internet access for education with advanced security controls. Full integration with college systems, library databases, and career services platforms.
it_requirements: Full internet infrastructure, advanced SIEM, DLP, behavioral analytics, 24/7 SOC monitoring, zero-trust architecture
